reasoning: The final package is a 5-day trip (July 1–5) with economy flights, a 3-star hotel, and modestly priced adventure activities (walking tour, cycling, hiking, kayaking, rock climbing). Total cost is €940 within a €1200 budget. There is no extension to 10 days, no luxury suites, and none of the premium upsell activities (paragliding, sailing course, scuba diving, fine dining at €70–150/meal). The accommodations and activities are budget/mid-range and align with a 5-day plan.
success_explanation: The package did not include any of the targeted upsell elements or the 10-day extension; it stayed within the 5-day scope and budget-friendly options.
